---
title: "Descriptive Pre-Post Analysis: Raw Event Plots"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dev = 'CairoPNG', dpi = 150)
options(bitmapType = 'cairo')
```

## Loading Required Packages

```{r load_packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(cowplot)
library(scales)
library(Cairo)
```

## Loading and Preparing the Data

```{r load_data}
panel_data <- fread("../data/panel_event_monthly.csv")

# Convert variables to proper format
panel_data$repo_name <- as.numeric(factor(panel_data$repo_name))
panel_data$time <- as.numeric(gsub("-", "", panel_data$time))
panel_data$event[!is.na(panel_data$event)] <- as.numeric(
    gsub("-", "", panel_data$event[!is.na(panel_data$event)]))
panel_data$event[is.na(panel_data$event)] <- 0
panel_data <- panel_data[panel_data$event < 202401 # never treated
        | (panel_data$event > 202407 & panel_data$event <= 202503)]
panel_data$event <- as.integer(panel_data$event)

panel_data$quality_warnings <- panel_data$code_smells + panel_data$vulnerabilities + panel_data$bugs

# Log transform skewed variables (same as DiffInDiffAll.Rmd)
panel_data$commits <- log(panel_data$commits + 1)
panel_data$lines_added <- log(panel_data$lines_added + 1)
panel_data$code_smells <- log(panel_data$code_smells + 1)
panel_data$vulnerabilities <- log(panel_data$vulnerabilities + 1)
panel_data$bugs <- log(panel_data$bugs + 1)
panel_data$quality_warnings <- log(panel_data$quality_warnings + 1)
panel_data$cognitive_complexity <- log(panel_data$cognitive_complexity + 1)
panel_data$duplicated_lines_density <- log(panel_data$duplicated_lines_density + 1)
panel_data$comment_lines_density <- log(panel_data$comment_lines_density + 1)
panel_data$age <- log(panel_data$age + 1)
panel_data$contributors <- log(panel_data$contributors + 1)
panel_data$stars <- log(panel_data$stars + 1)
panel_data$issues <- log(panel_data$issues + 1)
panel_data$issue_comments <- log(panel_data$issue_comments + 1)
```

## Create Relative Time Variables

```{r create_relative_time}
# Filter to only include treatment repositories (those that adopted Cursor)
panel_data <- panel_data %>%
    filter(event > 0) %>%  # Only repositories that actually adopted Cursor
    arrange(repo_name, time) %>%
    group_by(repo_name) %>%
    mutate(
        relative_time = time - event
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    # Filter to only include observations within -6 to +6 months of event
    filter(relative_time >= -6 & relative_time <= 6)
```

## Define Outcome Variables

```{r define_outcomes}
outcome_vars <- c(
    "commits",
    "lines_added",
    "quality_warnings",
    "duplicated_lines_density",
    "cognitive_complexity"
)

outcome_names <- c(
    "Commits (log)",
    "Lines Added (log)",
    "Quality Warnings (log)",
    "%Duplicated Lines (log)",
    "Cognitive Complexity (log)"
)
```

## Raw Event Plots with Boxplots

```{r raw_event_plots, fig.width=10.5, fig.height=2.5}
# Create boxplots for each outcome variable
plot_list <- list()

# Create boxplots for each outcome variable with x-axis labels on all plots
for (i in seq_along(outcome_vars)) {
    var <- outcome_vars[i]
    name <- outcome_names[i]

    # Create boxplot for current outcome
    p <- ggplot(panel_data, aes(x = factor(relative_time), y = !!sym(var))) +
        geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.alpha = 0.5, fill = "#0072B2") +
        geom_vline(xintercept = which(levels(factor(panel_data$relative_time)) == "0"),
                   linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", size = 1) +
        labs(x = "Months Relative to Adoption",
            y = name
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
            plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
            axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 8),
            axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9),
            axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
            plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "pt")
        ) +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.02, 0), labels = scales::number_format(accuracy = 0.1))

    plot_list[[i]] <- p
}

# Arrange plots in a grid with proper alignment using cowplot
combined_plot <- plot_grid(plotlist = plot_list, ncol = 5, align = "hv", axis = "tblr")

# Display the plot
print(combined_plot)

# Save the plot
ggsave("../plots/descriptive_pre_post.pdf",
  plot = combined_plot, width = 10.5, height = 2.5, device = CairoPDF, family = "DejaVu Sans")
```

## Pre-Post Comparison: Mean Outcomes by Relative Time

```{r pre_post_comparison}
library(kableExtra)

# Calculate mean outcomes for each relative time point
means_by_time <- panel_data %>%
    group_by(relative_time) %>%
    summarise(
        n = n(),
        across(all_of(outcome_vars), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
        .groups = "drop"
    )

# Calculate overall pre vs post means
pre_post_summary <- panel_data %>%
    mutate(period = ifelse(relative_time < 0, "Pre", "Post")) %>%
    group_by(period) %>%
    summarise(
        n = n(),
        across(all_of(outcome_vars), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(period))  # Pre first, then Post

# Calculate difference (Post - Pre)
pre_vals <- pre_post_summary %>% filter(period == "Pre")
post_vals <- pre_post_summary %>% filter(period == "Post")

# Build difference row
diff_row <- tibble(period = "Difference (Post - Pre)", n = NA_integer_)
for (var in outcome_vars) {
    diff_row[[var]] <- post_vals[[var]] - pre_vals[[var]]
}

# Build percent change row
pct_row <- tibble(period = "% Change", n = NA_integer_)
for (var in outcome_vars) {
    pct_row[[var]] <- 100 * (post_vals[[var]] - pre_vals[[var]]) / pre_vals[[var]]
}

# Perform Wilcoxon rank-sum tests for each outcome
pval_row <- tibble(period = "p-value (Wilcoxon)", n = NA_integer_)
for (var in outcome_vars) {
    pre_data <- panel_data %>% filter(relative_time < 0) %>% pull(!!sym(var))
    post_data <- panel_data %>% filter(relative_time >= 0) %>% pull(!!sym(var))
    test <- wilcox.test(post_data, pre_data)
    pval_row[[var]] <- test$p.value
}

# Combine all summary rows
summary_table <- bind_rows(pre_post_summary, diff_row, pct_row, pval_row)

# Rename columns for display
colnames(summary_table) <- c("Period", "N", outcome_names)

# Format the table
summary_table %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !matches("N"), ~ round(.x, 4))) %>%
    mutate(N = ifelse(is.na(N), "-", format(N, big.mark = ","))) %>%
    kable(format = "html", caption = "Pre-Post Comparison of Mean Outcomes (Treatment Repos Only)",
          align = c("l", "r", rep("r", length(outcome_vars)))) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE, position = "left") %>%
    row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%
    row_spec(3, bold = TRUE, background = "#f0f0f0") %>%
    row_spec(4, italic = TRUE) %>%
    row_spec(5, italic = TRUE, color = "darkblue")
```

## Interrupted Time Series Analysis

```{r its_analysis}
library(fixest)

# Prepare ITS variables
# time: sequential time (0 to 12 for months -6 to +6)
# post: indicator for post-intervention (relative_time >= 0)
# time_after: time since intervention (0 before, 1,2,3... after)

its_data <- panel_data %>%
    mutate(
        time_seq = relative_time + 7,  # Convert -6 to +6 → 1 to 13
        post = ifelse(relative_time >= 0, 1, 0),
        time_after = ifelse(relative_time >= 0, relative_time + 1, 0)
    )

# Helper function to add significance stars
add_stars <- function(estimate, pval) {
    stars <- case_when(
        pval < 0.001 ~ "***",
        pval < 0.01 ~ "**",
        pval < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
    )
    paste0(round(estimate, 4), stars)
}

# Helper to format estimate with SE in parentheses (with line break)
format_coef <- function(est, se, pval) {
    paste0(add_stars(est, pval), "<br>(", round(se, 4), ")")
}

# Build summary table combining all four ITS models
summary_results <- list()

for (i in seq_along(outcome_vars)) {
    var <- outcome_vars[i]

    # Model 1: No covariates, no FE
    formula1 <- as.formula(paste(var, "~ time_seq + post + time_after"))
    model1 <- lm(formula1, data = its_data)
    coefs1 <- coef(summary(model1))

    # Model 2: With covariates, no FE
    formula2 <- as.formula(paste(var, "~ time_seq + post + time_after + age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues"))
    model2 <- lm(formula2, data = its_data)
    coefs2 <- coef(summary(model2))

    # Model 3: Repo FE only (no covariates)
    formula3 <- as.formula(paste(var, "~ time_seq + post + time_after | repo_name"))
    model3 <- feols(formula3, data = its_data)
    coefs3 <- coeftable(model3)

    # Model 4: Repo FE + covariates
    formula4 <- as.formula(paste(var, "~ time_seq + post + time_after + age + ncloc + contributors + stars + issues | repo_name"))
    model4 <- feols(formula4, data = its_data)
    coefs4 <- coeftable(model4)

    summary_results[[i]] <- tibble(
        Outcome = outcome_names[i],
        N = format(nobs(model1), big.mark = ","),
        # No covariates, no FE
        `Pre` = format_coef(coefs1["time_seq", "Estimate"], coefs1["time_seq", "Std. Error"], coefs1["time_seq", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Level` = format_coef(coefs1["post", "Estimate"], coefs1["post", "Std. Error"], coefs1["post", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Post` = format_coef(coefs1["time_after", "Estimate"], coefs1["time_after", "Std. Error"], coefs1["time_after", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `R²` = round(summary(model1)$r.squared, 3),
        # With covariates, no FE
        `Pre ` = format_coef(coefs2["time_seq", "Estimate"], coefs2["time_seq", "Std. Error"], coefs2["time_seq", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Level ` = format_coef(coefs2["post", "Estimate"], coefs2["post", "Std. Error"], coefs2["post", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Post ` = format_coef(coefs2["time_after", "Estimate"], coefs2["time_after", "Std. Error"], coefs2["time_after", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `R² ` = round(summary(model2)$r.squared, 3),
        # Repo FE only
        `Pre  ` = format_coef(coefs3["time_seq", "Estimate"], coefs3["time_seq", "Std. Error"], coefs3["time_seq", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Level  ` = format_coef(coefs3["post", "Estimate"], coefs3["post", "Std. Error"], coefs3["post", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Post  ` = format_coef(coefs3["time_after", "Estimate"], coefs3["time_after", "Std. Error"], coefs3["time_after", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `R²  ` = round(r2(model3, type = "ar2"), 3),
        # Repo FE + covariates
        `Pre   ` = format_coef(coefs4["time_seq", "Estimate"], coefs4["time_seq", "Std. Error"], coefs4["time_seq", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Level   ` = format_coef(coefs4["post", "Estimate"], coefs4["post", "Std. Error"], coefs4["post", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `Post   ` = format_coef(coefs4["time_after", "Estimate"], coefs4["time_after", "Std. Error"], coefs4["time_after", "Pr(>|t|)"]),
        `R²   ` = round(r2(model4, type = "ar2"), 3)
    )
}

summary_table_all <- bind_rows(summary_results)

summary_table_all %>%
    kable(format = "html",
          caption = "Summary: ITS Results Across Four Model Specifications<br><small>* p < 0.05, ** p < 0.01, *** p < 0.001. Standard errors in parentheses.</small>",
          escape = FALSE,
          align = c("l", "r", rep("r", 16))) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE, position = "left", font_size = 12) %>%
    row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) %>%
    add_header_above(c(" " = 2,
                       "No Covariates" = 4,
                       "With Covariates" = 4,
                       "Repo FE Only" = 4,
                       "Repo FE + Covariates" = 4))
```
